mano_cua.result_summary: Globe模式(zoom=2)下setSky({})后天空渲染异常: 1. zoom=2 Globe模式球体上方背景出现浅灰色区域（sky效果渗透到globe模式）；2. zoom=10 Mercator模式下setSky({})天空效果没有可见渲染（背景保持黑色）；3. Globe/Mercator切换时sky渲染行为不一致。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: At zoom=2 globe mode with setSky({}), light gray area appears above earth sphere - sky effect leaking into globe mode. At zoom=10 mercator mode, setSky({}) sky effect not visible (background stays black). Sky rendering inconsistent between globe and mercator projections at different zoom levels.
